entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A very important crop in the West and Central Africa region.

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: Region where groundnut production is significant.

entities.name: DRY POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight of dry pods produced per hectare.

entities.name: ECONOMIC BENEFIT
entities.description: Financial gains including production value and net benefit per hectare.

entities.name: PLANT DENSITY
entities.description: A crop management practice involving row and intra-row spacing.

entities.name: ICRISAT-MALI RESEARCH STATION
entities.description: The research facility where the plant density experiments were conducted.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period characterized by rainfall during which experiments were conducted.

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period characterized by lack of rainfall during which experiments were conducted.

entities.name: NO MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: A scenario where the crop has sufficient water availability.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The count of pods produced by a single plant.

entities.name: SUDAN SAVANNAH
entities.description: The specific agroecology in West and Central Africa where plant density is recommended.
